introSection: Cork Screw is an Arrow Dynamics steel roller coaster located at Benyland in Sendai, Miyagi, Japan.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: After the closure of Corkscrew at Toshimaen, the trains from that roller coaster were purchased by Benyland for use on the Cork Screw. These trains differ from the original trains that ran on the Cork Screw as they use the lower, streamlined body style like Canyon Blaster or Drachen Fire.

fullText:
Cork Screw is an Arrow Dynamics steel roller coaster located at Benyland in Sendai, Miyagi, Japan.



After the closure of Corkscrew at Toshimaen, the trains from that roller coaster were purchased by Benyland for use on the Cork Screw. These trains differ from the original trains that ran on the Cork Screw as they use the lower, streamlined body style like Canyon Blaster or Drachen Fire.
